title: Classic Ruby Mod
description: This mod adds the classic Ruby to Minecraft.
body:
### THIS MOD IS MADE TO BE USED ALONGSIDE PROGRAMMER ART!


## Ruby Mod Technical Specifications
This mod introduces a ruby-based tier of equipment and materials. The following details outline the specific items and statistical properties included in the software.

# Included Items
The mod adds a total of 12 new items to the game:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


**Resource:** Ruby (Gemstone)

**Tools:** Ruby Sword, Ruby Pickaxe, Ruby Axe, Ruby Shovel, and Ruby Hoe.

**Armor:** Ruby Helmet, Ruby Chestplate, Ruby Leggings, and Ruby Boots.

**Blocks:** Ruby Ore, Block of Ruby (no Deepslate Ruby Ore)

</details>

Also includes 2 advancements for collecting a Ruby, and for getting a full set of Ruby armor.

![The ruby ore in question.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8842f252528cc3615c911bc814011c8409e7853.png)!

[The ruby itself.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f9f6dc69b934d778c6f7cf7422d78e853d116e5.png)
Also includes 2 advancements for collecting a Ruby, and for getting a full set of Ruby armor.
